title: controllers.json — automation controller definitions
description: Controllers evaluated at tick step 4. plant_validator.gd additionally enforces: target_actuator_id and pv_unit_id resolve to the topology, and min_output < max_output. FORCED/FAILED modes are deferred; only MANUAL and AUTO are valid.

$schema.description: Editor hint; ignored by the engine.

controllers.description: All automation controllers; empty array = none.

target_actuator_id.description: Valve whose commanded_position this controller drives in AUTO.

pv_property.description: Snapshot property read as the process variable.

control_mode.description: Starting mode. MANUAL: evaluate() does nothing. AUTO: proportional control with deadband.

setpoint.description: Target process-variable value (units of pv_property, e.g. [m] for level_m).

deadband_m.description: Half-width [m] of the no-action zone around zero error; output holds inside it.

min_output.description: Output clamp floor [%]. Must be < max_output (runtime cross-check).

kd.description: Derivative gain: output_delta = kd * (error - 2.0 * previous_error + previous_error2).
